urdu transliteration text:
Soja Meri Sakina
SLEEP MY SAKINA
@HujjatELC
Lori Suna Rahi Hun- I am telling a bedtime rhyme

Lori Suna Rahi Hun, Soja Meri Sakina
SLEEP MY SAKINA
@HujjatELC
Lori Suna Rahi Hun- I am telling a bedtime rhyme

Baba Ke Sine Se Tum Jabse Juda Huwi HoIk Raat Neend Ayi, Beta Nahi Hai TumkoAb Me Sula Rahi Hun Ajaa Meri Sakina
EVER SINCE YOU LOST YOUR FATHER,
@HujjatELC
Lori Suna Rahi Hun- I am telling a bedtime rhyme
english translation text:
YOU HAVE NOT SLEPT FOR EVEN ONE NIGHT,
NOW I AM PUTTING YOU TO SLEEP COME MY SAKINA

I KNOW YOU HAVE SUFFERED A LOT,
THIS IS ALLAH’S WILL, YOU MUST BE PATIENT ,
YOU MUST BE LIKE FATIMA (s.a.) MY SAKINA

NO ONE WILL COME TO WHIP YOU NOW,
SHIMR WILL NOT SLAP YOU ANYMORE.
DO NOT BE AFRAID, O MY SAKINA

SOON YOU WILL GET FREEDOM FROM PRISON MY SAKINA,
AFTER FREEDOM FROM PRISON WE WILL GO TO MADINA,
THIS IS YOUR MOTHER’S PROMISE TO YOU O SAKINA

urdu transliteration text:
Dekho Ab Aagaya Hai Baba Ka Sar Ay BetiUnko Dikhana Saare Chehre Ke Zakhm BibiJee Khol Ke Tu Ab To Rona Meri Sakina
LOOK, YOUR FATHER’S HEAD HAS ARRIVED MY DAUGHTER,
@HujjatELC
Lori Suna Rahi Hun- I am telling a bedtime rhyme
english translation text:
SHOW HIM ALL THE WOUNDS ON YOUR FACE,
YOU CAN CRY AS MUCH AS YOU WISH MY SAKINA

WHEN SHE FELL ASLEEP, SHE DREAMT THAT HER FATHER WAS TELLING HER,
NOW TIME HAS COME TO JOIN ME MY SAKINA

WHEN SAKINA DIED IN PRISON,
HER MOTHER HELD HER ARM AND CRIED,
WHAT HAVE I DONE WRONG, TELL ME O SAKINA

ABID A.S. MADE A GRAVE WITH TREMBLING HANDS
HE LAID HER TO REST, SAYING
HOW CAN I BEAR YOUR LOSS MY SAKINA

TEJANI, WHEN AHLUL BAYT WERE FREED FROM PRISON,
HER MOTHER WAS CRYING AND SAYING
HOW CAN I GO BACK WITHOUT YOU MY SAKINA
